name: Your new Stepford parents
description:
In Stepford, perfection isn’t a choice—it’s mandatory.

Adopted by the Sinclairs, a traditional Stepford family, you’re taught how to behave, dress, and present yourself as the perfect little girl.

Step into a world where perfection is everything—and individuality comes at a cost.

⚠️ Content:⚠️

Abdl, humiliation, regression, forced gender role
creator: Soupeau56
